summary: Unfocused GR-stage decomp PR that broadly factors a repeated stage-GObj callback setup sequence into Ground_SetupStageCallbacks across many src/melee/gr files, adds or recovers several StageCallbacks tables and stage setup functions, updates some headers/prototypes, and lands 8 complete grpushon matches plus several near-matches/improvements according to the bot report.

key_files.role: largest decomp/matching target; bot reports 8 new complete grpushon function matches and data-section improvements
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 8 new matches in main/melee/gr/grpushon

key_files.role: adds shared helper support used by many GR files
evidence_refs: PR body: factors out a very common pattern into a helper function

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grCn_803E1D8C[19], grCorneria_801DD534 implementation, pragma push/dont_inline
text_corpus: bot reports grCorneria_801DD534 99.95% and .data improvement

what_changed: Introduced or used Ground_SetupStageCallbacks to replace repeated manual setup of Ground callbacks, GX link setup, callback0 invocation, and callback2 proc setup in many GR stage factory functions.
Recovered several StageCallbacks arrays in GR files, including grCn_803E1D8C, grHr_803E8140, grOk_803E658C, and grOp_803E6688 in the loaded diff excerpt.
Implemented or improved stage GObj setup functions such as grCorneria_801DD534, grHomeRun_8021C82C, grOldKongo_8020F52C, grIceMt_801F71E8, and grPura_80211E08.
Implemented grHomeRun_8021C754 with stage initialization calls, camera/blast-zone offset calculations, and calls to grHomeRun_8021C82C.
Updated grhomerun.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures for grHomeRun_8021C82C and grHomeRun_8021EDD4.
Bot report recorded +0.04% matched code, +1740 bytes, 8 new full matches in main/melee/gr/grpushon, 14 unmatched-item improvements, and 1 unmatched-item regression in grPura_802125F0.
smart_moves: Factored a visibly repeated callback setup sequence into a helper instead of leaving many copied blocks across stage files.
Used callback table pointers such as StageCallbacks* callbacks = &table[gobj_id] before setup, making the indexed stage-callback pattern explicit.
Updated headers when function bodies established concrete prototypes, matching the truthful-headers standard.
Kept the PR reviewer-visible context honest: the author called the PR unfocused and identified the helper extraction as the dominant part of the change.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When many GR stage factory functions perform the same sequence after Ground_GetStageGObj, a shared helper can express the authored intent better than repeated generated-looking blocks, provided each site matches the same callback semantics.
evidence_refs: PR body: factors out a very common pattern into a helper function
diff_excerpt: grfigure1/grfigure2/grfigure3/grfigureget/grfourside/grgarden/gricemt/grpura replace manual callback setup with Ground_SetupStageCallbacks

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering StageCallbacks tables can unlock or improve nearby stage object setup functions, but data-table additions should be tracked as matching evidence rather than assumed semantic completion.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: StageCallbacks tables added in grcorneria.c, grhomerun.c, groldkongo.c, groldpupupu.c
text_corpus: bot reports .data improvements for grcorneria, grhomerun, groldkongo and near-matches for setup functions

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function proves a signature, update the owning header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grhomerun.h updates grHomeRun_8021C82C and grHomeRun_8021EDD4 prototypes

decomp_lessons.lesson: A cleanup/refactor PR can still carry regression risk; bot-reported regressions in adjacent or same-TU unmatched functions should be recorded even when the primary matches improve.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot reports 1 regression in main/melee/gr/grpura grPura_802125F0, -48 bytes, 75.26% to 72.51%

naming_conventions.convention: Stage callback tables use existing GR module prefixes plus address-style suffixes, e.g. grCn_803E1D8C, grHr_803E8140, grOk_803E658C, grOp_803E6688.
Clear local role names are used for stage setup helpers: gobj for HSD_GObj*, gp for Ground*, callbacks for StageCallbacks*, and gobj_id or arg0 for the stage object index.
Unproven functions retain address-style names such as grHomeRun_8021C754 and grOldKongo_8020F52C rather than speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: recovered functions keep address-style names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a shared inline/helper for repeated stage callback setup, but include the helper only where needed.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: added gr/inlines.h includes in files using Ground_SetupStageCallbacks

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover indexed StageCallbacks tables before implementing setup functions that select callbacks by gobj_id.
A tightly scoped #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop was used around grCorneria_801DD534.
OSReport file/line formatting was adjusted at several failure paths, including __FILE__ use in some files and a corrected %s format in gricemt.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grfigure2/grfigure3/grgarden OSReport changes to __FILE__; gricemt OSReport string correction

review_feedback.text: Author described the PR as unfocused and said most of it factors a very common pattern into a helper function; the author suggested that part could have been split into a separate PR.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Bot reported +1740 matched bytes, 8 new complete grpushon matches, 14 unmatched-item improvements, and 1 regression in grPura_802125F0.

follow_up_queries: Search for remaining manual GR stage callback setup blocks that duplicate Ground_SetupStageCallbacks semantics.
Search src/melee/gr for StageCallbacks tables still missing or still declared with incomplete types.
Inspect whether grCorneria_801DD534 still requires the dont_inline pragma after later matching work.
Check later PRs touching grPura_802125F0 to see whether the bot-reported regression was resolved.
Search grhomerun.h for remaining UNK_RET or UNK_PARAMS after grHomeRun_8021C82C and grHomeRun_8021EDD4 were updated.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed-file list, counts
text_corpus.jsonl: PR body, bot report, approved review
notes: The loaded raw diff is truncated, so exact edits for many small changed files are known only from changed-file metadata, not inspected hunks.
The bot report gives match/improvement/regression data, but no local build logs or objdiff artifacts are loaded beyond the report.
No inline review comments are present; review feedback is limited to one approval comment and the bot report.
The PR was merged, but this intake does not infer that every tactic or helper pattern is a global standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Factor repeated GR stage callback setup into a helper when semantics match
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2310 shows many GR stage factory functions replacing an identical manual sequence with Ground_SetupStageCallbacks: clear x8/xC callbacks, set GX link, copy callback3 into x1C_callback, invoke callback0, and register callback2 as a proc. This is a candidate lesson for src/melee/gr cleanup, not a global rule for unrelated subsystems.
evidence_refs: PR body: factors out a very common pattern into a helper function

accepted_candidate_records.title: StageCallbacks table recovery can support setup-function matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR adds StageCallbacks arrays and corresponding setup functions in several GR files; the bot report shows near-match improvements for grCorneria_801DD534, grHomeRun_8021C82C, grOldKongo_8020F52C, and grIceMt_801F71E8. Candidate should retain the caveat that data-table edits need section evidence and regression checks.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr stage callback setup helper pattern
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/gr, many stage GObj factory functions use a StageCallbacks table indexed by gobj_id/arg0 and call Ground_SetupStageCallbacks(gobj, callbacks) after Ground_GetStageGObj succeeds; failure paths commonly OSReport "couldn t get gobj(id=%d)" with file and line.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful subsystem-specific path fact for future GR decomp work; should be curated against current source before acceptance.

source_update_candidates.title: Repeated callback setup blocks may indicate a source helper
source_update_candidates.text: When many functions repeat the same typed setup sequence and a local helper exists or can be recovered, prefer the helper over copied generated-looking blocks, but only after verifying that each site's side effects and callback table indexing match.
evidence_refs: PR body: factors out a very common pattern into a helper function
diff_excerpt: manual blocks replaced by Ground_SetupStageCallbacks
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential refinement of existing infer-authored-source-style and typed-fields-over-pointer-math standards; should not be promoted without comparing broader project examples.

source_update_candidates.title: Record bot regressions even in approved matching PRs
source_update_candidates.text: If a bot report lists regressions in unmatched items, preserve that detail in the matching ledger even when the PR is approved and has net positive matched bytes.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists one grPura_802125F0 regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate reinforcement of verification-and-regression-ledger with concrete PR evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer from this PR alone that #pragma dont_inline is an accepted GR matching style; the diff shows a narrowly scoped use in grCorneria_801DD534 but no explanatory review or objdiff detail.
Do not treat all 49 changed files as inspected at hunk level; the loaded diff is truncated and several file-specific changes are known only from changed-files metadata.
Do not promote StageCallbacks table names or contents as source-of-truth path facts without checking current source/symbol metadata.
